description: End-to-end workflows that chain skills into complete professional objectives

workflows.name: From Zero to Health AI Practitioner
workflows.description: Complete on-ramp from no digital skills to RAIGH Tier 1 certification. Starts with digital literacy and Gen AI basics, progresses through digital health foundations, and culminates in AI evaluation competency. Designed for medical students in their first 2 years.
workflows.target_outcome: Student is digitally literate, understands Gen AI and health data ethics, masters FHIR and DHIS2, and can critically evaluate health AI studies

steps.name: Digital Foundations
steps.description: Learn file management, cloud storage, internet safety, and professional communication
steps.output: Organized cloud folder + professional email + security setup

steps.name: AI Awareness
steps.description: Understand Gen AI, detect hallucinations, apply VERIFY framework, learn privacy rules
steps.output: Hallucination hunt report + VERIFY analysis + AI privacy policy

steps.name: Data Rights
steps.description: Master health data types, patient rights, consent design, and data protection
steps.output: Consent form + violation analysis + country data protection summary

steps.name: FHIR Basics
steps.description: Read, interpret, and create FHIR resources for health data exchange
steps.output: FHIR resources created and validated

steps.name: DHIS2 Reporting
steps.description: Navigate DHIS2 for data entry and dashboard interpretation
steps.output: DHIS2 data entry completed + dashboard interpretation report

steps.name: AI Study Evaluation
steps.description: Apply TRIPOD+AI to evaluate a published health AI study
steps.output: TRIPOD+AI assessment of 1 published study

steps.name: Model Calibration
steps.description: Assess whether AI predicted probabilities match reality
steps.output: Reliability diagram + ECE calculation + clinical interpretation

steps.name: Clinical Utility
steps.description: Determine if the model actually improves clinical decisions
steps.output: Decision curve + clinical recommendation

success_criteria: All Pre-MOOC artifacts completed (digital literacy, AI awareness, data rights)
Portfolio of 3 AI evaluation artifacts (TRIPOD+AI, calibration, DCA)
Ready for PAATHI Tier 1 certification assessment

workflows.name: Medical School Digital Transformation Pilot
workflows.description: Complete end-to-end workflow for digitalizing a medical school, from initial assessment to first AI-ready data. Designed for the University of Liberia pilot and replicable across African medical schools.
workflows.target_outcome: Institution assessed, records migrated, first dashboard live, AI readiness scored

steps.name: Quick Assessment
steps.description: Rapid 2-hour assessment to understand current state and prioritize
steps.output: AI Readiness Scorecard (0-100) + radar chart

steps.name: Deep Audit
steps.description: Full 10-dimension audit with stakeholder interviews
steps.output: Audit report + quick wins list + digitalization roadmap

steps.name: Records Priority
steps.description: Inventory all paper records, score priorities, design data entry forms
steps.output: Record inventory + priority matrix + data entry form design

steps.name: Student Record Migration
steps.description: Migrate highest-priority student records to digital system
steps.output: Populated database + quality report + analytics dashboard

steps.name: Health Data Literacy
steps.description: Train faculty and selected students on health data standards
steps.output: Trained cohort + FHIR resources created from institutional data

steps.name: DHIS2 Integration
steps.description: Connect institutional data to national health information systems
steps.output: DHIS2 data entry capability + dashboard interpretation skills

success_criteria: AI Readiness Score documented for the institution
At least 1 paper record type fully migrated to digital
Analytics dashboard live with real institutional data
At least 5 faculty/students trained on health data standards
Replicable template documented for next institution

workflows.name: Become a Health AI Evidence Evaluator
workflows.description: Complete pathway from understanding health data to critically evaluating any health AI claim. Produces a portfolio of evidence assessments suitable for the RAIGH Tier 1 certification.
workflows.target_outcome: Practitioner can independently evaluate health AI evidence and produce model cards

steps.name: Data Foundations
steps.description: Understand the data that health AI consumes
steps.output: FHIR resources created and validated

steps.name: Reporting Standards
steps.description: Learn to evaluate whether a study is properly reported
steps.output: TRIPOD+AI assessment of 1 published study

steps.name: Calibration Assessment
steps.description: Go beyond AUROC — assess whether predicted probabilities are trustworthy
steps.output: Reliability diagram + ECE calculation + clinical interpretation

steps.name: Clinical Utility
steps.description: Determine whether the model actually improves decisions
steps.output: Decision curve + threshold analysis + clinical recommendation

steps.name: Evidence Chain
steps.description: Map the full evidence lifecycle from lab to deployment
steps.output: 5-phase evidence chain map + gap analysis

steps.name: Model Documentation
steps.description: Synthesize everything into a standardized model card
steps.output: Complete model card + narrative summary

success_criteria: Portfolio of 6 artifacts demonstrating health AI evaluation competency
At least 1 complete model card for a real health AI tool
Evidence chain assessment identifying gaps in a published tool
Clinical recommendation based on DCA for a specific use case
Ready for PAATHI Tier 1 certification assessment
